mapper.select: select ur.user_rights_id as userRightsId, rt.rights_name as rightsName, rt.rights_type as rightsType, ur.remain_quota as remainQuota, ur.quota_value as quotaValue, ur.status, ur.valid_end as expireTime, ur.valid_start as validStart from jst_user_rights ur left join jst_rights_template rt on ur.rights_template_id = rt.rights_template_id where ur.del_flag = '0' and ur.owner_id = #{userId} and ur.owner_type in ('channel', 'user') and ur.status in ('available', 'approved') order by ur.valid_end asc

select er.enroll_id as enrollId, c.contest_name as contestName, er.score_value as scoreValue, er.score_rank as scoreRank, er.score_level as scoreLevel, er.score_remark as scoreRemark, er.update_time as updateTime from jst_enroll_record er inner join jst_contest c on er.contest_id = c.contest_id where er.del_flag = '0' and er.user_id = #{studentUserId} and er.score_value is not null order by er.update_time desc

select er.enroll_id as enrollId, c.contest_name as contestName, er.cert_url as certUrl, er.cert_no as certNo, er.update_time as updateTime from jst_enroll_record er inner join jst_contest c on er.contest_id = c.contest_id where er.del_flag = '0' and er.user_id = #{studentUserId} and er.cert_url is not null order by er.update_time desc
select binding_id as bindingId, user_id as userId, channel_id as channelId, binding_status as bindingStatus from jst_student_channel_binding where binding_id = #{bindingId} and del_flag = '0'
